message.content:
Read the announcement Controller files in D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\src\main\java\com\yottastudios\ns\collabspace\announcement\controller\

Find all controller files (glob for *.java in controller directory), read them all, and output for EACH interface:
- Full method signature
- HTTP method and path (from @GetResource/@PostResource annotations)
- Permission annotations (requiredPermission, externalOnly)
- Parameter source (@RequestBody, @RequestParam, @PathVariable)
- The RO class name used (if any)
- The return type

Be thorough - don't miss any endpoint.
